title: galeopsis ladanum subsp. arvatica
intro: Galeopsis ladanum subsp. arvatica, also known as Russian galega or Russian galeopsis, is a plant species belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, Galeopsis ladanum subsp. arvatica has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also rich in antioxidants, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall health. Herbal preparations of Galeopsis ladanum subsp. arvatica include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve symptoms of colds, sore throats, and respiratory issues.
